name: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc.
business: Sprouts Farmers Market is a specialty grocer offering fresh, natural, and organic foods with a curated assortment of better-for-you products. The company targets health enthusiasts and selective shoppers seeking innovative, attribute-driven products.

exposures.sentence: We provide a full omnichannel offering through delivery or pickup via our website or the Sprouts app.

To further develop our capabilities, we continue to evaluate and integrate emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, and cloud computing to support automation, generate more timely insights, and enhance scalability.

To address risks such as cybersecurity threats, system disruptions, and data breaches, we have implemented a multi-layered security program that includes threat detection tools, monitoring processes, third-party security assessments, employee cybersecurity training, and disaster recovery and incident response protocols.

catalysts.event: Open more than 40 new stores in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to continue to expand our store base with more than 40 store openings planned for fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete transition to self-distribution model for meat and seafood, servicing approximately 95% of stores
catalysts.sentence: We expect to transition our remaining distribution centers in 2026, resulting in approximately 95% of our stores to be serviced through our for meat and seafood self-distribution model.

catalysts.event: Nationwide launch of Sprouts Rewards loyalty program
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched our Sprouts Rewards loyalty program nationwide which we believe will allow us to enhance our customer engagement.
